"C:\Users\IT ZOOM\scoop\apps\cmake\current\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\tamrin2.dir/objects.a
C:\Users\ITZOOM~1\scoop\apps\mingw\current\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\tamrin2.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\tamrin2.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Users\ITZOOM~1\scoop\apps\mingw\current\bin\C__~1.EXE -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\tamrin2.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o tamrin2.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtamrin2.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\tamrin2.dir\linkLibs.rsp
